body: ## [2.4.1](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v2.4.0...v2.4.1) (2018-01-04) ### Bug Fixes * **core:** correct escape highlight for arrays and nested objects ([#2646](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2646)) ([ed0ee73](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/ed0ee73))
